description: Wire the run-outcome policy into the run finalize path (#120), part 1 of 2: in Scheduler's end-of-run Finalize, resolve mergeOnSuccess OFF when RunOutcomePolicy.SuppressesDelivery(recorded decisions) is true (machine-decided work is never auto-delivered — #340), and surface the 'ran with N unreviewed waves' count (RunOutcomePolicy.ProceededUnreviewedWaveCount) on RunReport. Scheduler.cs overlaps task 05 on a linear chain (09 dependsOn 05) — allowed, no sibling collision. The distinct exit code is task 10.
